content: Create SQLAlchemy models for Scenario, ScenarioVersion, ScenarioImpactPreview
Create Pydantic schemas for scenario validation and API responses
Build NGFSSyncService for data integration with external sources
Build ScenarioBuilderService for creating and managing scenarios
Build ScenarioImpactService for calculating scenario impacts on portfolios
Create async worker tasks for NGFS data synchronization
Create API routes for scenario management endpoints
